sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 49

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 49:1
items.html:
(to the question) Chelek me Rucha Kadma'a [a part of the first spirit]
Two parts are discerned in that spirit which her husband casts into her in the first coming [Bi'ah Kadma'a]: the first is what came out there upon the discernment of the Masach [screen] of the wife herself, which is her part, for her own building. The second is what came out there upon the added MAN [Mayin Nukvin] of the lower one, which cleave to her AHP; this is the lower one's part, which is with her as a deposit so long as the lower one itself is not fit to receive the whole of that level which came out there. And she gives it to him by measures, by way of the degrees: first Nefesh, then Ruach, until she completes for him the NRNCHY of Nefesh, and then gives him the orders of the degrees of Ruach — until she hands over the whole level of the lower one, all that came out upon his MAN in the first coming. Then the way of women ceases for her, for she has nothing more to bring forth, and nothing remains in her but her own part, which is all her vitality. And if this vitality too departs from her, she dies — in the secret of the verse "as her soul was departing, for she died." See Answer 11. (p. 745, Item 15)
